question: The chart displays quarterly customer support tickets. Based on this data, which of the following conclusions can be made?

options.A: Q1 has more tickets than Q4.
options.B: Q1 has nearly three times as many tickets as Q4.
options.C: Q2 has the highest number of tickets among all the quarters shown.
options.D: Q1 and Q1 (next year) have nearly identical numbers of tickets.

explanation: This bar chart uses dual encoding: the same value is shown with bar height, bar width, and color intensity. That combination exaggerates differences and can make moderate gaps look much larger. The reliable conclusion is the correct option based on the numeric labels/data.
